QUERY                                                                                                  ROWS WRITTEN  ROWS READ
SELECT id, title, task_id, metadata, status FROM actions WHERE task_id IN (?, ?)                        0             120000000
INSERT INTO events (entity_type, entity_id, event_type, payload) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)                    17668         22085
SELECT id, metadata FROM actions WHERE metadata LIKE '%permission_mode%' OR metadata LIKE '%worktree%'  0             90000000
SELECT 'task' AS entity_type, t.id, t.project_id FROM tasks t WHERE t.title LIKE '%' || ? || '%'        0             60000000
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 'action', a.id, t.project_id FROM actions a JOIN tasks t ON a.task_id = t.id
		WHERE a.title LIKE '%' || ? || '%'
COMMIT                                                                                                 0             0
